---
title: "Affine"
generated: true
description: "Affine (general linear + translation) transform."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register`](../nitrix-register.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.register._model`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:Affine -->
```python
class Affine
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:Affine -->
Affine (general linear + translation) transform.

The parameter vector holds `ndim**2` row-major linear-generator
entries followed by `ndim` translation entries (12 in 3-D, 6 in
2-D). The linear block is the matrix exponential (`matrix_exp`)
of the generator, guaranteeing an invertible, orientation-preserving
map.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:Affine.n_params -->
```python
n_params(ndim: int) -> int
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Parameter count: `ndim**2` linear-generator entries plus
`ndim` translations.

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:Affine.exp -->
```python
exp(params: Float[Array, '... p'], *, ndim: int) -> Float[Array, '... d1 d1']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Affine exponential map via [`affine_exp`](../nitrix-geometry-transform/affine_exp.qmd), returning the
homogeneous $(\text{ndim} + 1, \text{ndim} + 1)$
transform whose linear block is the exponential of the
generator.

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:Affine.rescale_to_grid -->
```python
rescale_to_grid(params: Float[Array, ' p'], ratio: Float[Array, ' d']) -> Float[Array, ' p']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Rescale to a finer grid by scaling the trailing translation
block by `ratio`; the linear-generator block is
grid-invariant and left unchanged.

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:Affine.__init__ -->
```python
__init__() -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:Affine -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
